name: West Africa Energy Corridor
macro_gravity_summary: Power demand rises while grid reliability lags. Capital and governance must align to close the gap.

name: MENA Cross-Border Infrastructure Activation Program
macro_gravity_summary: A structured activation platform designed to convert regional pressure into deployable cross-border infrastructure. Focused on digital sovereignty, distributed energy resilience, and corridor integration. Built to align with Public Investment Fund mandate priorities by accelerating projects from concept to FID with clear governance, defined capital pathways, and early risk allocation.

name: Nigeria Financial & Energy Circulation Spine
macro_gravity_summary: A licensed, revenue-generating microfinance banking and financial circulation system embedded in Nigeria, integrating: regulated banking core, wallet and payment rails, 2000+ fuel station QR redemption nodes, enterprise allocation controls, and a governance control plane.
structural_role: UDG executes. USG architects scale, governance alignment, and regional expansion sequencing.

name: Hyperscaler-Aligned AI Infrastructure Platform (Andhra Pradesh)
macro_gravity_summary:
Government land/power enablement plus L&T execution and Nvidia anchoring create high-pressure pre-FID conditions for a gigawatt-scale AI campus, with unresolved sponsor governance and capital-stack sequencing as the primary bottleneck.

Platform Structure

This initiative proposes a hyperscaler-aligned sovereign AI compute campus in Andhra Pradesh.

The platform requires alignment across:

- hyperscaler demand
- sovereign AI program adoption
- energy infrastructure
- data sovereignty regulation
- sovereign capital sponsors
- EPC delivery partners

Final Investment Decision (FID) occurs once capital sponsors, hyperscaler demand, regulatory approvals, and power infrastructure are aligned.
structural_role: USG designs commitment architecture pre-FID: governance, capital sequencing, risk allocation, and bankability package.
fid_event_definition: Capital close + tenancy/offtake commitments + governance package ratification + EPC NTP + power/land enforceable terms

political.role_definition: Provides the sovereign operating environment for the project, including land allocation, power infrastructure coordination, regulatory approvals, and policy support for the AI infrastructure campus.

Approves and monitors foreign capital participation in strategic infrastructure projects. Ensures compliance with national security, foreign investment, and ownership regulations affecting international investors.
Enforces requirements regarding where sensitive data must physically reside. Ensures AI compute infrastructure complies with data localization policy.

asset.role_definition: Designs, engineers, and constructs the physical AI infrastructure campus, including facilities, cooling systems, power integration, and supporting infrastructure.
Designs and plans large-scale data center campuses optimized for hyperscaler compute infrastructure, including site planning, scalability, utility integration, and long-term campus expansion.
Operates the completed infrastructure campus, managing uptime, cooling systems, maintenance, and day-to-day facility operations.
Provides large-scale long-term compute demand commitments that stabilize infrastructure revenue through long-term compute agreements.

Represents government or national AI programs that purchase or reserve compute capacity for sovereign AI initiatives such as national research, digital public infrastructure, or defense-adjacent applications.

development.role_definition: Acts as the structured equity investment vehicle used to pool, govern, and deploy long-term infrastructure equity capital.

capital.role_definition: Provides cornerstone equity investment and participates in governance of the infrastructure platform. Anchor capital commitments signal credibility and enable additional institutional investment.
Supplies large-scale sovereign capital participation and strategic alignment for global AI infrastructure development.
Participates as a sovereign capital investor contributing long-term infrastructure equity and institutional credibility to the capital stack.
Provide long-term debt financing for infrastructure construction and expansion. Underwrite credit risk, structure loan facilities, and supply leverage for project capital stacks.

delivery.role_definition: Supplies grid power required to operate hyperscale compute infrastructure. Responsible for generation capacity, grid connection, and long-term power delivery agreements.
Develops renewable energy infrastructure that supplies sustainable power to the AI campus through long-term power purchase agreements or dedicated generation facilities.
Supports procurement, manufacturing logistics, and delivery of specialized AI hardware required for large-scale compute clusters.

political.role_definition: Provides the sovereign operating environment for the project, including land allocation, power infrastructure coordination, regulatory approvals, and policy support for the AI infrastructure campus.

name: Gulf–Africa Trade Corridor Platform
macro_gravity_summary: The stabilization of Dangote refinery and other African supply nodes creates a window to architect a Gulf–Africa trade corridor. A UAE-based platform can aggregate Gulf demand, coordinate logistics, and route refined products and other commodities from African supply anchors to global markets.
structural_role: USG designs phase-gated commitment architecture: domestic-priority compatibility now, export-valve activation criteria next, and global distribution scale once allocation thresholds are met.
fid_event_definition: Formal corridor SPV/JV execution triggered by sustained export allocation, anchored sponsor commitments, approved trade-finance lines, and contracted multi-year offtake under UAE operating structure.
phase_label: Phase-2 export corridor once African supply nodes reach stable export allocation.

name: Gravity (Coin + City)
macro_gravity_summary: Infrastructure-first economic coordination system using stablecoin settlement and credibility rails to sequence city buildout.
next_intelligence_action: Identify sovereign anchor buyer and DFI de-risking path

name: Pan-African Digital Health Backbone
macro_gravity_summary: Build a unified, cloud-native digital health backbone for Carepoint across Rabito/Lily/Seha hospitals and expansion markets, combining telehealth, interoperable clinical data infrastructure, and AI-enabled decision support to improve access, quality, and equity for underserved populations across Africa. Phase focus: reference architecture, cross-border data governance, provider workflow integration, and scalable operating model for 10+ country rollout.
source_note: Initiative seeded from Isaac-provided Carepoint Vision brief (June 2025).

political.role_label: Cross-Border Health Data Policy Forum / Regional Policy Counterpart
Cross-Border Health Data Policy Forum / Regional Policy Counterpart
